name: bioethics_port_security_scanner_flags_kestrel_car_fair
premise: A CRISPR therapy consent form omitted a long-tail risk that emerged in mice after enrollment closed. In Bioethics, the situation tagged internally around bioethics port security scanner flags kestrel car fair has converged with local pressure in the Port corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Finance notes that the fastest mitigation spends down a restricted reserve that another program legally depends on next quarter. A vendor’s root-cause paragraph contradicts your internal postmortem draft; both cannot be true, but neither is fully disprovable yet. A public briefing is scheduled; if no coherent position exists, staff will improvise talking points from conflicting drafts. Framing has already hardened externally as care against fairness; internal nuance will not survive the first news cycle unless it is extremely careful.

agents.name: Elliot Haddad
agents.identity: I am Elliot Haddad, the senior manager who must reconcile legal, ops, and customer-facing reality in one decision in Bioethics. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat fairness as disposable collateral every time care spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Harper Nowak
agents.identity: I am Harper Nowak, the risk and equity liaison pushing back on silent harms in Bioethics. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so care cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes fairness in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will impose a narrow, time-boxed intervention with human override, subgroup checks, and a hard stop if harm rises—accepting slower relief to protect fairness.
I will authorize a broad immediate action to stabilize outcomes now, with post-hoc measurement and correction—accepting elevated risk to fairness to secure care before the window closes.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Silence will be interpreted as a decision by everyone outside this room. Elliot Haddad must choose under care versus fairness. What does Elliot Haddad do?
